name: Create a new revision via the Duplicate Part action
steps:
Given a part 'PCB Assembly' exists with revision code 'A'
Given the 'Part Revisions' global setting is enabled
Given a user with part create permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'PCB Assembly'
When the user clicks the part actions menu (three vertical dots on the top right)
When the user selects 'Duplicate Part'
When the user sets the 'Revision Of' field to 'PCB Assembly' and the 'Revision' field to 'B'
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the browser redirects to the new part revision showing 'Revision: B' and 'Revision Of: PCB Assembly'
